patches.title: Palworld's Bucky got off a plane to find 'about 8,000 Discord messages from Palworld fans' who really wanted him to know about Pickmon: 'God bless their little hearts'

patches.title: Palworld shows off concept art for new pals as part of its 2-year anniversary celebration as Pocketpair's CEO promises fans 'we will do everything we can to meet your expectations'
patches.author: Elie Gould
patches.content:
Palworld's
1.0 release is coming up soon. Well that could be wishful thinking: it'll be available to play sometime this year. But after two years in early access there's nothing but excitement for this next step. And to celebrate the lead up to 1.0 and the two-year anniversary Pocketpair has released some concept art of new pals...
Read more.

patches.title: v0.7.1: Balance adjustments and bug fixes
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content: [p]\[Patch Notice] [/p][p]Palworld version v0.7.1 has been released! [/p][p][/p][p]＝＝＝ [/p][p][/p][p]▼Balance Adjustments[/p][p]・In PvP, the on-screen raid log will now continue to be displayed while your base is under attack from other players.[/p][p]・The Summoning Altar at your base will no longer be destroyed at the end of the raids inside the raid area. [/p][p]・Reduce the recovery time between swings for melee weapons (Swords, Katana, Beam Swords).[/p][p]・Increased the attack range of melee weapons (Swords, Katana, Beam Swords). [/p][p][/p][p]▼Bug Fixes[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where mods would still function when enabled in their individual settings even when "Allow Mod Use" was turned off in the Mod Management menu.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where attack notifications would not appear when another player approached your base while riding a Pal in PvP.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where Hartalis "Sacred Barrier" was not properly blocking the Oil Rig's anti-aircraft laser.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where working Pals would sometimes freeze in combat mode during raid boss battles and not engage in combat.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where Life Fruit, Power Fruit and Stout Fruit would not be rewarded when clearing the Hartalis raid boss on "Extreme" difficulty.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where players would die while on water after leaving a dungeon and before landing, causing their inventory and Pals to be dropped back into the dungeon.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where Pals consumed in a Pal Essence Condenser would disappear after a short time had passed since being restored from the Global Pal Box.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where Wall Signs would be placed embedded into certain buildings when constructed on them.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where the graphics of some building materials and equipment would not be rendered correctly.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where some background music and sound effects would continue to play or would play in the wrong place.[/p][p]・\[Steam] Fixed an issue where the achievement "Alpha Pal Slayer" would not be unlocked correctly.[/p][p]・Other minor bugs fixes.[/p][p][/p][p]＝＝＝ [/p][p][/p][p]Thank you for your continued support of Palworld.[/p]

patches.title: The Home Sweet Home update for Palworld with the ULTRAKILL crossover is out now
patches.content:
Palworld just levelled up with a big new free Home Sweet Home update as Pocketpair work towards finishing up the game for a full release next year.
Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2025/12/the-home-sweet-home-update-for-palworld-with-the-ultrakill-crossover-is-out-now/

patches.title: Palworld v0.7 - Home Sweet Home
patches.author: pocketpair_dev
patches.content:
[previewyoutube="Vn4-gKzJr0A;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][h3]2025 has been an incredible year for Palworld, and we’re excited to end the year with v0.7, Home Sweet Home! The purpose of this update is to begin improving existing features, and while this update may not be as content-rich as previous ones, we hope players understand that it’s necessary for us to begin laying the groundwork now as we work on the development of Palworld 1.0. [/h3][p][/p][h3]You can find more info about this in our Palworld 1.0 video here:[/h3][h2][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/tEVIBHP37eM?si=K33bxXJNwmQWgnYX"][/dynamiclink][/h2][h1][b]Palworld v0.7 - Home Sweet Home! [/b][/h1][h2][b]▼ ULTRAKILL Collaboration![/b][/h2][p]Palworld’s second collab, ULTRAKILL, finally arrives! [/p][p]This update adds several iconic weapons and armour, as well as a V1’s infamous coin toss! Thank you to New Blood and Hakita for allowing us to play with their incredible game, and we hope our fans will enjoy taking on battles in a fresh, stylish way with this special equipment![/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/9aeaf159f1fbb7960102a107fcc5d9c3ab109512.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][h2][b]▼ Improvements to Building[/b][/h2][p]A big part of the Home Sweet Home update is, as the name suggests, your home! [/p][p]We have been blown away by all the incredible builds that you guys have been sending us, and we know that you have been eagerly waiting for more freedom in how you design your base. This update brings a large number of new building parts, including the much-requested triangular pieces!
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/938144c1a50616e9963aeb0b4a85f7cb5032b2d1.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Another new addition to the building system in this update is the ability to change the colour of building pieces! Express yourself in any way you feel like by adding a splash of your favourite colour to your home!
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/e097712a303304068e3c99d7843406a42bd72031.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The building menu UI has been redesigned and reformatted into a list. You can now select the structures and parts you need more intuitively, which should result in an overall smoother building experience!
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/abf103c9e78de775fb1017254e9b088213efef99.jpg"][/img][/p][h2][b]▼ Raid Battlefields![/b][/h2][p]When summoning a raid boss at the Summoning Altar, players can now choose to either fight at their base as before, or take on the raid boss in a special “Raid Area”.
These Raid Areas allow you to fight with all your might, without risking any damage to your base. You can build temporary structures and take items into these special Raid Areas. [i]
[/i][b] [/b][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/944e272e2785ae34f2431654e900f18b6407d617.jpg"][/img][/p][p]That’s not all… A new raid boss has also appeared! Team up with your Pals and allies to take on this new formidable foe![/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/f6dd1bb7cda1e429f27d5339bd465d32abaad389.jpg"][/img][/p][h2][b]▼ Improved Melee Combat[/b][/h2][p]Melee is often overlooked in the late game, so we wanted to start improving the system to make it more viable and fun for players. To that end, we have made improvements to the melee gameplay!
The basic attack actions for swords, katanas, and beam swords have been changed. You can now perform attacks consecutively by repeatedly pressing left click (right trigger on controller). In addition, special attacks have been added to katanas and beam swords. You can activate a special attack by holding down right click (left trigger on controller) and left click (right trigger on controller). Take your melee gameplay to the next level![/p][p]This is our first pass at improving the melee combat, and we have even more improvements planned to the melee system for 1.0! [/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="hLUWtTwER28;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][h2][b]▼ Steam Workshop[/b][/h2][p]We would like to express our deepest thanks to the Palworld modding community, who, since day 1 have been passionately making so many fun mods for Palworld. We have now added Steam Workshop to the game, allowing players to try out a variety of mods and discover new ways to play with greater ease! If you are interested in modding, please head over to the Steam Workshop for more details!
Please note that Steam Workshop is only available for the Steam version of Palworld.
Please also note that some servers, including official servers, prohibit the use of mods in order to ensure fair play. To that end, we recommend only using mods in single-player or with your friends.
A special thank you to Primarinabee and Okaetsu for their help and assistance with this feature![/p][p][/p][p]For more information about modding and how to mod, please see the guidelines and documentation provided on our Steam Workshop or visit the Palworld modding GitHub: [/p][p][url="https://github.com/pocketpairjp/PalworldModUploader/tree/main"]https://github.com/pocketpairjp/PalworldModUploader/tree/main[/url]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/7bbd72cfec9a1e584014f66986961b24074f4af1.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][h2][b]▼ PvP (Experimental) [/b][/h2][p]PvP has been a topic of discussion in the Palworld community for a long time, and although it’s hard to fully integrate PvP into the game, we are releasing all the necessary tools for players to set up their own PvP rules on their own terms.
Show off your skills and compete with other Pal Tamers!
Please note that PvP is experimental, and as such, there may be some balancing issues. [/p][p][/p][p]For more information on how to enable and set PvP parameters on your server, please see the new PvP guidelines in our server documentation: [url="https://docs.palworldgame.com"]https://docs.palworldgame.com[/url][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/6e8171bc0143fdbca61618de0c0f400a2b312fb9.jpg"][/img][/p][h2][b]▼ Palworld x Makeship Merch![/b][/h2][p]We're excited to announce 8 brand new plushies, made in partnership with Makeship![/p][p]Starting today, you can pre-order Zoe or some of your favorite Pals![/p][p]These plushies are available exclusively at Makeship, and only while stocks last.
[/p][p][url="https://www.makeship.com/shop/creator/palworld"]https://www.makeship.com/shop/creator/palworld[/url][/p][p][url="https://www.makeship.com/shop/creator/palworld"]
[/url][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/98489d6b80cbd12bcfa7cfccdf1ef275cef15179.png"][/img][b]
[/b]Thank you again to all of our fans and players for your continued support for Palworld. [/p][p]We’re hard at work on Palworld 1.0, and are so excited for you to get your hands on the full version of the game in 2026! [b]
[/b][/p][h1][b]▼ Full Patch Notes[/b]
[/h1][p][b]\[Patch Notice][/b][/p][p][b]Palworld version v0.7.0 has been released![/b][/p][p]
[b]＝＝＝[/b][/p][p]
[b]▼ULTRAKILL Collab![/b][/p][p][b]・Added V1 and V2 armor sets! Terrorize the Palpagos Islands as your favorite blood-fueled robot![/b][/p][p][b]・Added a pair of iconic weapons from ULTRAKILL![/b][/p][p][b]・Unique Mechanic - Coin Toss[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Throw coins while using the Marksman Revolver to perform a Ricoshot! Bullets will ricochet off the thrown coin and deal devastating damage to nearby targets![/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼Base Building Improvements[/b][/p][p][b]・Added 48 new building parts, including triangular pieces![/b][/p][p][b]・Added the ability to change the color of some buildings and foundations![/b][/p][p][b]・Changed the building UI to a list-based system.[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼Raid Boss Improvements[/b][/p][p][b]・Added a new raid boss![/b][/p][p][b]・Added a new battlefield for raid bosses. Players can now choose to challenge raid bosses in their base or in a new separate battlefield. [/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼Melee Combat Improvements[/b][/p][p][b]・Improved the melee gameplay for swords, katanas and beam swords. Pressing left click (right trigger) will perform a new consecutive combo attack. [/b][/p][p][b]・Special attacks have been added to the katana and beam sword. Holding either left or right click (left or right trigger) will activate these abilities. [/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼New Features[/b][/p][p][b]・Added PvP functionality (Experimental!).[/b][/p][p][b]・\[PC - Steam Only] Added Steam Workshop, allowing players to download and use mods. [/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼Mechanic Adjustments[/b][/p][p][b]・When placing a building, an arrow indicating the building's orientation will now be displayed.[/b][/p][p][b]・When placing a building, buildings with a set work location will now display a Cattiva icon indicating the work location.[/b][/p][p][b]・Adjusted the Palbox so it can be aligned with foundations and roofs. [/b][/p][p][b]・\[Keyboard & Mouse Controls] Building controls have been made more intuitive, and continuous building has been changed to the default setting.[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼Balance Adjustments[/b][/p][p][b]・Added new implants to the surgery table:[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Implant: Mine Foreman[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Implant: Logging Foreman[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Implant: Fine Furs[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Implant: Sleek Stroke[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Implant: Work Slave[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]・You can now get a Little Kinship Peach from a Pal when freeing them from an enemy camp.[/b][/p][p][b]・The last hit done to an enemy while using mercy will now display ""MERCY HIT"" to indicate that no damage was done.[/b][/p][p][b]・Changed specifications so that all Pals will no longer lose SAN when taking damage.[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]・Reduced the impact of bad status effects:[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Hungry... Attack, Defense, Work Speed ​​-20% → -10%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Starving... Attack, Defense, Work Speed ​​-50% → -20%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Cold... Work Speed ​​-10% → -5%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Sprain... Movement Speed ​​-10% → -5%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Overfull... Increased hunger loss rate by 100% → +50%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Ulcer... Work Speed ​​-20%, Movement Speed ​​-10% → Work Speed ​​-10%, Movement Speed ​​-5%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Fracture... Work Speed ​​-10%, Movement Speed ​​-20% → Work Speed ​​-5%, Movement Speed ​​-10%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Weakened... Work Speed ​​-20%, Movement Speed ​​-30% → Work Speed ​​-10%, Movement Speed ​​-20%[/b][/p][p][b]⤷Depressed... -30% Work Speed, -20% Movement Speed ​​→ -20% Work Speed, -10% Movement Speed[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]・Changed the attribute of the Broncherry's unique skill ""Body Smash"" from neutral to the grass.[/b][/p][p][b]・Changed the attribute of Rushoar's unique skill "Heavy Charge" from neutral to earth.[/b][/p][p][b]・Added "Item Decay Speed ​​Multiplier" to the Options Settings.[/b][/p][p][b]・\[Dedicated Servers] Police NPCs targeting players who have committed crimes will now only deal damage to the target player and their guild.[/b][/p][p][b]・The appearance of the work aptitude icon has been changed.[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b]▼Bug Fixes [/b][/p][p][b]・Fixed an issue where Flopie would not collect dropped items in the field while her partner skill "Helper Bunny" was active. [/b][/p][p][b]・Improved Pal pathfinding AI ​​to make it easier to reach the target location within the base.[/b][/p][p][b]・Fixed an issue where summoned Pals would attack visitors when set to "attack aggressively."[/b][/p][p][b]・Fixed an issue where attacking visitors in your base would not result in the correct attacking state. [/b][/p][p][b]・Many other minor bug fixes.[/b][/p][p]
[b]＝＝＝ [/b][/p][p]
[b]Thank you for your continued support of Palworld.[/b][/p][p][/p][p]
[/p]

patches.title: Palworld publishing boss says 'I haven't really touched so-called AAA titles', adding that they tend to be 'overwhelmingly about graphic quality and fidelity'
patches.author: Justin Wagner
patches.content:
When it's not equipping little critters with assault rifles or
fending off lawsuits
for those critters' resemblance to Pokémon, Palworld studio Pocketpair is stepping in to publish small-scale indies. It's got a host of upcoming games on the docket, such as pixelated fishing game
Normal Fishing
and the Hollow Knight-esque
Never Grave
. The studio's publishing manager, John Buckley, said that's no coincidence—indie games are his foremost passion...
Read more.

patches.title: Nominate Palworld for the Labor of Love Award! Steam Awards 2025.
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content: [p]Hello everyone![/p][p][/p][p]Another year has already passed, and once again we would like to ask for your support by voting for Palworld in the 2025 Steam Awards![/p][p][/p][p]This time, we would be honored if you considered voting for Palworld in the "Labor of Love" category.[/p][p][/p][p]Thanks to our players, we've received countless incredible suggestions for new content, as well as invaluable feedback on how to improve the game. With the help of our community, we've shipped 18 patches full of improvements and bug fixes, along with two major updates, and a third arriving this December![/p][p][/p][p]We're also hard at work on Palworld 1.0, scheduled for release next year, and we hope you'll continue to support us as we work toward this milestone together.[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you for your continued support of Palworld![/p]

patches.title: Palworld dev Pocketpair, famous for making wholly original games, won't publish your game if it uses generative AI
patches.content:
Earlier this year,
Palworld
developer Pocketpair used its newfound success to
start a publishing arm
. This, I think, is generally a net good, even if I have some feelings about the studio as a whole, which we'll dig into shortly. Nobody has money in this industry except for the few who do, so when a few of the few who do decide to put some of that money into much smaller games, that is somewhat of a win. But heed this warning from Pocketpair's communications director and publishing manager John Buckley: they won't publish your game if you use generative AI.

patches.title: 'Now you've got no excuses': Palworld is teaming up with Core Keeper for a Steam Autumn sale bundle because the folks over at Pocketpair are 'just big fans'
patches.author: Elie Gould
patches.content:
Palworld
developer Pocketpair has proved time and again that it's no stranger to supporting other indie games, whether that be by
setting up shop as a publisher

patches.title: Capcom legend tackles Palworld-Nintendo battle and manages to annoy almost everyone: 'It's a game that transcends the boundaries of war'
patches.author: Rich Stanton
patches.content:
Pocketpair’s Palworld has certainly found an audience since release: even if, unfortunately, those interested include Nintendo's lawyers. The ongoing copyright lawsuit between the indie studio and the most venerable company in gaming is the subject of great interest worldwide, but of particular fascination in Japan, where the suit is filed and where both companies are based...
Read more.

patches.title: Ex Resident Evil dev says Palworld "crosses lines that should not be crossed"
patches.author: editor@pcgamesn.com
patches.content:
As
Palworld
developer Pocketpair handles legal challenges from Nintendo over patented game mechanics, it's also come under fire from ex-Capcom developer Yoshiki Okamoto in a new YouTube video that accuses it of breaking boundaries that should be considered sacred. Since becoming one of Steam's most popular games ever at launch, Palworld has done a good job of establishing its own, standalone brand among the
best survival games
, setting it apart from the Pokemon-like designs that initially gave it notoriety. However, former Street Fighter 2 producer Okamoto, who also worked on the likes of Resident Evil, Dino Crisis, and Devil May Cry, isn't happy with it.
Read the rest of the story...

Only last week, Palworld developer Pocketpair announced that the hit survival game, which remains in early access, would be going quiet as it
prepared for a full launch in 2026

the announcement
of an unexpected crossover, albeit with scant detail...

patches.title: The Palworld devs are making their very own Pal-filled Stardew Valley
patches.content:
Palworld
developers Pocketpair have revealed Palfarm, a new farming spin-off whose cheeky compound title implies the possibility of countless other Palspin-offs, from Pal
train Simulator
to Pal
netenverteidigungskanonenkommandant
.
It appears to be a Palworld version of
Stardew Valley
, with players alternating between tending crops, mining the caves, battling wildlife, and bonding with the local NPCs. As in vanilla Palworld, you can capture Pals with different abilities and set them to work on tasks like sowing and watering. Here's a trailer.

patches.title: ULTRAKILL x Palworld! Collab coming later this year!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content: [p]Collaboration gear and weapons from the cult-hit game ULTRAKILL (developed by Arsi "Hakita" Patala, published by New Blood Interactive) are coming to Palworld! [/p][p]ULTRAKILL is an ultra-violent retro FPS that embodies its tagline: “Mankind is dead. Blood is fuel. Hell is full.” Players take control of the combat machine “V1,” using blood harvested from enemies as energy to stylishly and swiftly annihilate the legions of Hell.[/p][p]A collab no one saw coming. [/p][p]Will blood rain upon the Palpagos Islands? Please look forward to this unprecedented encounter![/p]

patches.title: Nintendo reportedly gets even more obnoxious about patent law by taking a 'mods aren't real games' stance against a Dark Souls 3 mod that could invalidate its Palworld lawsuit
patches.author: Lincoln Carpenter
patches.content:
Last year,
Nintendo initiated a patent lawsuit
against Palworld developer Pocketpair, and in the months since the Pokemon publisher has seemingly decided to double down on
moustache-twirling IP law villainy
at every opportunity. The latest development in the Pocketpair proceedings might be Nintendo's worst look yet, because the company has reportedly decided that modders' ideas don't count. Cool!..
Read more.

patches.title: v0.6.6: Balance adjustments and bug fixes
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content: [p]Palworld version v0.6.6 has been released![/p][p]＝＝＝[/p][p]▼Balance Adjustments & System Changes[/p][p]・A warning will now be displayed on screen if the world settings are set too high for the system playing the game.[/p][p]・Changed Herbil Pulse so that players will be invincible for a short time when getting up.[/p][p]・Slightly expanded the hit detection of Excalibur’s shockwave.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where the hit detection and visual effects of Terra Blade were misaligned.[/p][p]・\[Controller] Easy Bulk Storage control adjustment: pressing the LS button now applies immediately.[/p][p]・Changed the appearance of Pal's rank-up items.[/p][p]・Adjust NPC trust modifiers to be in line with the implementation of NPC passive skills. [/p][p]・Added "Item Decay Speed" options to the world settings. [/p][p]▼Bug Fixes[/p][p]・Implemented countermeasures for save data bloating and rollback issues.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where passive skill effects were not applied to human NPCs.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug that allowed climbing on spheres during capture.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where the sorting order of Key Items appeared to shuffle randomly.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where treasure chests would sometimes not appear at the end of random dungeons.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where Zoe’s Assault Rifle would continue to fire after defeating an enemy.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where shooting Boost Gun / Mega Boost Gun at base Pals while mounted would not increase their stats.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug in multiplayer where equipping a waist lantern and entering a dungeon would turn the entire screen yellow.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where using High Breach with Whalaska or Whalaska Ignis could sometimes cause the player to fall through the floor.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where if Herbil was used just before the player became incapacitated, Herbil Pulse would not activate and progression could become impossible.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where NPCs would not retaliate when attacked.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug that allowed construction near towers.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where battle BGM would sometimes continue playing after the player died.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where aim assist would not function properly during the Moonlord battle.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where certain Pal skills would fail when used over water.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug in the Arena where using “Huggy Fire” would cause enemies to become stuck.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where Hallowed Plate Mail was not reducing damage taken from Extreme Moonlord.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where unreleased items were being displayed in the flea market. [/p][p]・Fixed an issue where DualSense input was not supported on Windows (Win64).[/p][p]＝＝＝[/p][p]Thank you for your continued support of Palworld.[/p]

patches.title: Palworld developer planning a "massive update" for v1.0, which is coming soon
patches.author: editor@pcgamesn.com
patches.content:
Remember that brief period of time when
Palworld
was purported as a 'Pokemon killer,' despite the fact that it shares far more similarities with the likes of Valheim than any Nintendo game? I'm surprised some of the monster designs weren't involved in the game's legal proceedings, but developer Pocketpair created a game that captured the hearts of the gaming world. With over two million players logging in at its peak, it put Pocketpair on the map. 18 months after its storming launch, Pocketpair has announced that the game is leaving early access, and v1.0 is on the horizon.
Read the rest of the story...

out

staring down Lionel Hutzes who probably know the DK rap off by heart.
They've also teased that a bunch of new additions are in the works for the 1.0 update.

patches.title: In what was likely a karmic inevitability, Palworld now has its own shameless imitator on the Switch

While Nintendo might've found a way to
bring Pocketpair to court over patents

Goodra
body, that doesn't make it any less grimy...

patches.content:
There's just something about collectables in videogames that scratches an itch for me. Whether it's monsters, mascots, or mates, I can't help but spend hours unearthing hidden characters or unseen achievements. Pocketpair's popular
Palworld
is just one of many games that's effectively captured the buzz of creature collecting, because there really is no better feeling than farming with your Pals. Except for fighting alongside them, of course, and Palworld's latest patch has just made one boss fight even harder.

patches.title: v0.6.4：Moon Lord [Master] and bug fixes!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content: [p]\[Patch Notice][/p][p]Palworld version v0.6.4 has been released![/p][p][/p][p]＝＝＝[/p][p][/p][p]▼New Content[/p][p]・Added a more powerful version of Moon Lord! Moon Lord \[Master]![/p][p]⤷ Gather new Celestial Sigil \[Master] to face this terrifying foe![/p][p][/p][p]▼Mechanic Adjustments[/p][p]・Summoned Pals no longer deal damage when bumping into neutral, non-hostile Pals.[/p][p]・Sending an overpowered Pal team on an expedition no longer reduces the expedition time, but instead increases the quantity of rewards.[/p][p]・Summoned Pals are returned to the player's party upon player death.[/p][p]・Enemies will no longer respawn when their bases are cleared (Enemy-built bases – Not static camps).[/p][p]・Death markers on the map will now be displayed above base icons.[/p][p]・The amount of fish shadows at a fishing spot will now persist even if the player leaves.[/p][p]・Additional fishing spots have been added around the world.[/p][p]・Adjusted the UI messaging for when the player can't afford to buy Pals from NPCs.[/p][p]・Adjusted the interaction logic for opening and closing cages in enemy bases, which was sometimes unresponsive depending on the camera angle.[/p][p]・Adjusted the building restriction radius around the expedition station.[/p][p]・Items bought from the Flea Market can no longer exceed one stack per purchase.[/p][p]・Fixed the behavior of the Homing Sphere Launcher.[/p][p][/p][p]▼Balance Adjustments[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where the partner skill "Trigger Happy" had unintendedly high power.[/p][p]・Increased the drop rate of legendary blueprints from the chests at the end of the Terraria dungeon.[/p][p]・Adjusted the selling price of the Terraria monsters.[/p][p]・Added Heat Resistance Lv1 / Cold Resistance Lv1 to Hallowed Plate Mail.[/p][p]・Adjusted the breeding results when using Eye of Cthulhu.[/p][p]・Changed the raid boss reward logic so that players can receive rewards even if they didn't deal direct damage to the boss.[/p][p]・Increased the drop quantity of "Ancient Civilization Parts" from certain Alpha Pals.[/p][p]・Increased the amount of Overheat Rifle ammo crafted from 5 to 10.[/p][p]・Increased swimming speed for some Pals.[/p][p]・Adjusted the map placement of certain mission NPCs so that they can be accessed by players at more appropriate levels.[/p][p][/p][p]▼Major Bug Fixes[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where mission progress was lost or would not progress.[/p][p]・Fixed an issue where Pals in dimensional storage would disappear.[/p][p]・Upon dying inside the Terraria Dungeon, the player's items and Pals are now dropped in front of the dungeon entrance.[/p][p][/p][p]▼Bug Fixes[/p][p]・Fixed an issue in the Moon Lord raid where Pals would continue to attack already-destroyed body parts.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where defeating Moon Lord would unlock the wrong achievements.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where using Herbil's partner skill during a tower boss battle could cause the player to get trapped inside.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where Herbil's partner skill in combination with certain enemy skills could cause the game to soft lock.[/p][p]・Fixed a crash that occurred when switching input methods while using the chat.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug that prevented players from handing over Pals in missions when using a controller.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug that caused missions to duplicate when logging in to dedicated servers.[/p][p]・Fixed inconsistencies in NPC dialogue and mission dialogue.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where capturing a target during a mission would incorrectly count it as two kills.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where detailed info for owned Pals was not being displayed in the Pal delivery mission UI.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where descriptions for some missions were not being displayed correctly in the mission list.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where some missions continued to be displayed as in progress even after completion.[/p][p]・Fixed a localization bug where some text was appearing in Japanese even when the game was set to another language.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug that was causing sound effects to play over and over after finishing a mission.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where the cursor would not appear or scroll when opening the mission menu with a controller.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where some skills used while mounted would unintentionally go through walls.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where some skills would target players from the same guild.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where the fishing minigame would start with a smaller capture gauge under certain conditions.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where the fishing guide would sometimes stop being displayed.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where players could fish through walls or floors.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where fishing and salvaging sound effects could be heard from far away in multiplayer.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug with the fishing pond that was not correctly reducing the fishing time with certain work suitability items etc.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug that prevented Jelliette and Jellroy partner skills from activating.[/p][p]・Fixed a bug where items dropped underwater wouldn't float to the surface.[/p][p]・Fixed an exploit where certain NPC visitors to the base could be captured repeatedly for infinite rewards.[/p][p]・Adjusted Frostplume's behavior so that their partner skill doesn't activate in the arena if they aren't the primary opponent.[/p][p]・"Mercy" will no longer apply inside the arena.[/p][p]・Fixed spawn location discrepancies for certain Pals.[/p][p]・Fixed missing partner skill icons.[/p][p]・Fixed the sorting order for some food items.[/p][p]・Various other minor bug fixes.[/p][p][/p][p]＝＝＝[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you for your continued support of Palworld.[/p]

Palword
jump back into Steam's Top 10 most-played games...

patches.author: Andrea Shearon
patches.content:
Palworld starts pretty light-hearted, then throws you into its rather twisted survival-crafting deep end with its grim production stations and Pal breeding. And if you want to dominate the end game, you'll need to do more than just breeze on by some of Palworld's unsettling fundamentals...

patches.title: Where to find the Terraria dungeon in Palworld, plus the new Pals and items you'll find inside

Palworld
crossover with Terraria is finally upon us, but to dive into the update's biggest offerings, you'll first need to map out its new islands. patches.title: Palworld just got a huge Terraria-themed update, which as it turns out is a lot less ridiculous than Silent Bob in Warzone
patches.author: Justin Wagner
patches.content:
You might know
Palworld
for its
jaw-dropping player counts
, its uncanny
resemblance
to the world's biggest media franchise, or its
legal battle
with Nintendo over that last thing I mentioned. Despite all the hubbub, it's just a
pretty alright
survival crafting game full of cute monster buddies parodying (or ripping off, depending on how cynical you are) Pokémon. They say imitation is the sincerest form of flattery, I suppose, and now it's doing its best Terraria impression—though it's a collaborative effort this time...
Read more.

patches.title: Palworld v0.6.0: Tides of Terraria has been released!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content:
[h2][b]\[Tides of Terraria Update Notice] [/b][/h2][p]Update v0.6.0 has been released.[/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="cIfw_RUnjR8;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][p]＝＝＝[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Terraria Collab! [/b][/p][p]・Terraria Dungeon[/p][p]⤷ A unique dungeon featuring enemies from Terraria has been added! Collect materials in the dungeon to create equipment from the world of Terraria![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Terraria Equipment [/p][p]⤷ 6 new weapons and 7 new armour pieces from Terraria have been added![/p][p]
[/p][p]・The terrifying "Moon Lord" raid boss has appeared! [/p][p]⤷ The Moon Lord has invaded Palworld! Work together with your friends and Pals to defeat the greatest threat the islands have faced![/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼New Content[/b][/p][p]・PS5 Dedicated Servers![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Fishing![/p][p]⤷ Craft a fishing rod and bait to catch new Pals! To start fishing, cast your rod in water where you can see fish shadows. [/p][p]
[/p][p]・Salvage System![/p][p]⤷ Ride on water Pals and use the fishing rod to salvage supplies at sea! Collect new ores salvaged from the ocean floor to strengthen your weapons.[/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Islands![/p][p]⤷ Three new types of islands have been added to the world: Tropical Islands, Iceberg Island, and Shipwreck Island! Find new Pals that live on each of these new islands![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Mission System! [/p][p]⤷ You can now find and accept missions around the Palpagos Islands. Help the islanders and get rewards![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Zoe's Special Mission! [/p][p]⤷ By completing missions for Zoe, you can earn her trust and recruit her as an ally![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Pal Trust Mechanic![/p][p]⤷ The more time you spend with your Pal, the more trust you will gain, and stats will be increased. The weaker a Pal's original stats are, the greater the trust adjustment will be, so even weaker Pals will be able to shine![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Sleep together with your Pals![/p][p]⤷ After a hard day of farming and battling bosses, you and your Pals can take a hard-earned rest together! [/p][p]
[/p][p]・Treasure Maps![/p][p]⤷ Use treasure maps to find the location of the hidden treasure and obtain valuable items![/p][p]
[/p][p]・Enemy Bases?![/p][p]⤷ Enemy factions now build bases just like players! They are on high alert and will defend it with their lives, but if you manage to raid them successfully, you can obtain new blueprints for buildings related to that faction.[/p][p]
[/p][p]・Settlement Overhaul![/p][p]⤷ We've made the settlements larger and feel more lived-in! There are also many mission NPCs now to meet. [/p][p]
[/p][p]・Player level cap raised from 60 to 65! [/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Buildings![/p][p]⤷ Pal Surgery Table - By using various implants, you can overwrite your Pal’s passives! You can also change the gender of your Pals here![/p][p]⤷ Fishing Pond - Relax and catch some fish in the comfort of your base.[/p][p]⤷ Hexolite Quartz Mine - Well, you knew we would add this one eventually! [/p][p]⤷ Large Incubator - Hatch multiple eggs at the same time! [/p][p]⤷ Palbox Control Device - A terminal that allows you to access your Pal Box from anywhere in the base. It makes Pal swapping during raid battles more efficient.[/p][p]
[/p][p]・ New Building Material -  \[Clean][/p][p]⤷ Decorate your base with futuristic floors and walls with this new building set![/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Mechanic - Turbulence [/p][p]⤷ Find unusual air turbulence around the world and use it to jump high into the sky! [/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Weapons![/p][p]⤷ Charge Rifle[/p][p]⤷ Energy Shotgun[/p][p]⤷ Overheat Rifle[/p][p]
[/p][p]⤷ Boost Gun[/p][p]⤷ Pal Recovery Grenade[/p][p](These two are weapons for tamers who want to support their Pal!)[/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Item Types![/p][p]⤷ Whistles and Growth Acceleration Bell have been added![/p][p]⤷ New food recipes.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Arena[/b][/p][p]・A single-player challenge mode has been added! [/p][p]⤷ Raise your rank by facing off against the fierce warriors of Palpagos Island! Get various rewards with the battle tickets you receive when you win![/p][p]
[/p][p]・You can now set rules in the arena, such as banning certain pals.[/p][p]・A public Pal Box has been added at the entrance to the arena that all players can use. [/p][p]・An arena spectator function has been added in multiplayer![/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Mechanic Adjustments[/b][/p][p]・Added equipment durability to the game settings.[/p][p]・When a cooling Pal is assigned to the flea market, food spoilage rate is now reduced.[/p][p]・Lyleen’s ability “Bountiful Protection” now recovers HP for all allies within range.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Balance Adjustments [/b][/p][p]・Some aggressive enemies have been made friendly. [/p][p]・Pal skill cooldowns will tick down even if they are not summoned. [/p][p]・The speed and stamina of Pals that can be mounted have been adjusted, and the speed of some Pals that were too slow has been improved. [/p][p]・The lineup of bounty hunters has been expanded. [/p][p]・With the implementation of the mission system, the rewards obtained from NPCs have been adjusted. To maintain fairness, conversation logs with all NPCs have been reset so that rewards can be received again. [/p][p]・Pal Condensation is considered end-game content, so the strength of Axel, Marcus, and Victor on normal difficulty has been reduced to reduce its necessity. [/p][p]・The power of some active skills, such as Pal Blast, has been increased. [/p][p]・The probability of getting books that enhance Pal's work aptitude from attribute treasure chests has been increased.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Pals[/b][/p][p]・New Skins!! [/p][p]The results of the 1st year anniversary popularity poll have been decided, and three new skins have been added to celebrate these results![/p][p](※You must own the Pal to equip the skin) [/p][p]⤷ Crown Chillet[/p][p]⤷ Cyber Jetragon[/p][p]⤷ Desert King Anubis [/p][p]
[/p][p]・Pals can now swim![/p][p]⤷ Swimming motions and animations have been added for Pals, and their speed in the water has been adjusted. [/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Water Skills[/p][p]⤷ Geyser Gush[/p][p]⤷ Aqua Surge[/p][p]⤷ Torrential Blast[/p][p]⤷ Hydro Slicer[/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Grass Skills[/p][p]⤷ Crosswind[/p][p]⤷ Reflect Leaf[/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Ice Skill[/p][p]⤷ Freeze Wall[/p][p]
[/p][p]・New Unique Skills[/p][p]⤷ Hydro Spin[/p][p]⤷ Thalasonic Laser[/p][p]⤷ High Breach[/p][p]⤷ Lantern Sweep[/p][p]⤷ Scorching Lantern Sweep[/p][p]⤷ Smoke Jet[/p][p]⤷ Trigger Happy[/p][p]⤷ Chaotic Spray[/p][p]⤷ Konoha Flip[/p][p]⤷ Deep Breath[/p][p]⤷ Dash Kick[/p][p]⤷ Thunderslide[/p][p]
[/p][p]・New passive skills have been added![/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼UI[/b][/p][p]・Implemented "Easy Bulk Storage" feature! Conveniently store all materials in any chest around your base with the click of one button![/p][p]・Changed specifications to automatically select materials in bulk in the Pal Condensation UI.[/p][p]・You can now set and quickly select your current Pal presets from the Pal Box UI.[/p][p]・All neutral enemies now have green HP gauges, and only aggressive or hostile enemies have red HP gauges.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Multiplayer[/b][/p][p]・Fixed a bug where the option to display servers with matching versions was not working.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼World[/b][/p][p]・Added more patterns to random dungeons.[/p][p]・Fishing spots where fish shadows appear have been placed all around the world. [/p][p]・Salvage spots have been placed out at sea.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Achievements[/b][/p][p]・Several new achievements have been added.[/p][p]
[/p][p][b]▼Bug fixes[/b][/p][p]・Fixed a bug where Jetragon would jump too high when jumping.[/p][p]・Many many other minor issues have been fixed.[/p][p]
[/p][p]＝＝＝[/p][p]
[/p][p]Thank you for your continued support of Palworld.[/p][p]
[/p]

patches.title: Palworld Tides of Terraria Revealed as Pocketpair’s First Collaboration

patches.content:
A major crossover between Pocketpair’s
Palworld
and
Terraria
has been announced, called
Tides of Terraria
, and it brings new pals, mechanics and a Raid Boss.
The past year has been a series of ups and downs for Pocketpair’s
Palworld
, from
Nintendo issuing a lawsuit
that has resulted in gameplay changes to
Palworld
since September 2024 (since the lawsuit, Pal Spheres have been removed and gliding creatures have been ‘fixed’), to KRAFTON helping Pocketpair drop the title on mobile, and the big
Feybreak
expansion
that fans flocked back to Palpagos Island in droves for. Pocketpair
has revealed a new trailer
today showcasing its first major collaboration event,
Tides of Terraria
. The animated trailer can be seen below.
While the trailer is very brief, the
Tides of Terraria
trailer embodies the spirit of both indie titles, although the crossover event is only happening on the
Palworld
side of things. There has been no announcement on whether
Terraria
...

patches.title: Palworld's newest patch stops you from gliding with your Pals, and yes, it is because of Nintendo's lawsuit

We all know that
Palworld
developer
Pocketpair
are currently dealing with a lawsuit from Mario maker
Nintendo
. Specifically, it's over
patent rights
, rather than something like copyright infringement which everyone was expecting given the liberties that Palword takes with its Pal designs. In November it was confirmed
what those patents are
, partially relating to the fact you could throw out your Pals from a ball and they'd appear, similar to Pokemon Legends Arceus. That feature was patched out from Palworld though, and in a new post Pocketpair has confirmed that this is because of the ongoing lawsuit.

patches.title: Palworld is changing several key gameplay systems amid Pokemon Company lawsuit
patches.author: editor@pcgamesn.com
patches.content:
Palworld
, oh, how I've missed you. Blasting onto the scene in January of last year, topping the charts and upsetting parents everywhere, Pocketpair's colossal survival game has been quiet as of late, possibly a result of ongoing legal troubles with Nintendo. Several of Palworld's game mechanics have been compared to the Switch maker's classic creature catcher, Pokemon, with various models also allegedly plagiarized from Nintendo's game. While aspects and mechanics of Palworld have already been removed or adjusted in response to the lawsuit, Pocketpair has now confirmed that more "disappointing" changes are on the way.
Read the rest of the story...

patches.title: New Palworld update adds crossplay, Photo Mode, new drafting table feature and cosmetic armour
patches.content:
You've
crossbred Pokénots
in
Palworld
, now get ready to crossbreed... players! Pocketpair have taken a break from their packed schedule of
saloon brawls with Mario's lawyers
to update their monster-catching
survival
game with a new Crossplay mode, together with new storage options, a Photo Mode, a cosmetic armour system, and a new Drafting Table feature. That and a multitude of smaller tweaks and fixes.
Witness the crossplaying in the below trailer, in which a base-vandalising Astegon gets its bell rung by a group of visitors presumably running foreign hardware. That'll learn 'em to step on my Lamballs.
Read more

patches.title: Make sure you're sitting down: Palworld's crossplay update is now live, also bringing photo mode and the ability to use chairs like they aren't dodgy public toilets
patches.content:
Palworld
now has crossplay, thanks to a fresh update that's just dropped and brought with it a pretty beefy list of other additions and changes - including a photo mode and the ability to sit down in a way that seemingly won't risk your character ending up floating in mid-air.

patches.title: Crossplay Update v0.5.0: Play across all platforms, Global Palbox and more!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content:
[previewyoutube=gWjKPwcuIOg;full][/previewyoutube]
[Crossplay Update Notice]
Update v0.5.0 has been released.
＝＝＝
▼New Content
・Crossplay!
⤷ Cross-play is now available across all platforms.
・Global Palbox
⤷ Store Pal data in the Global Palbox and transfer Pals between worlds!
・Dimensional Pal Storage
⤷ A new storage system with 10 times the capacity of a regular Palbox! Guild members can access it, and it can also be used as a personal storage with private settings.
・Cosmetic Armour System!
⤷ You can now equip armour cosmetically in the Antique Dresser. Change your character’s appearance without affecting armour stats!
・Photo Mode
⤷ Accessible from the Pal Command Wheel. Hide the UI and move the camera around to take stunning screenshots.
・Drafting Table
⤷ Combine low-rarity blueprints to create higher-rarity ones!
・Dedicated Servers for Mac
▼Specification Adjustments
・Buildings can now be placed even if they overlap with a Pal
・When connecting foundations or roofs, the connected pieces will now automatically align in the same direction
・Assigning an Ice Pal to the Flea Market will slow down item decay in storage and sales
・Added torches at the entrances of random dungeons for better visibility
・Players can now sit on chairs and cushions
・Some weapons that dealt ultra-high damage to trees will no longer drop items upon destruction
・Added new NPCs and improved NPC behaviour during conversations
▼Balance Adjustments
・Adjusted elemental chest rewards. Dog Coins will always drop from these chests and they also have a small chance of containing work suitability books. (Existing chests in current worlds will retain old drop tables; new ones will follow the updated table.)
・Increased EXP gained from defeating the Attack Chopper
・Increased the DPS of Flamethrowers
・Adjusted the default attack used by Electric and Dark Pals when all active skills are on cooldown, making them more in line with the other elements
・Some human NPCs now have work suitability and work animations when assigned tasks at a base
・Summoned raid bosses can no longer damage other bases
・Added Water attribute to Dumud
・NPC event rewards have been adjusted. To maintain fairness, all NPC conversation logs have been reset, allowing players to claim rewards again!
▼UI
・Favourites have been categorised into Favourite 1, 2, and 3 groups
・Holding the +/- button in the Pal Soul Enhancement UI will now continuously increase/decrease values
・Added a new sorting option for Pal Box: Sort by Work Suitability Level
・Added a "Extra Large" text size option
・Added Fullscreen Mode
▼Achievements
・Added several new achievements
▼ Bug Fixes
・Fixed an issue where players could get launched into space while climbing
・Fixed a bug where getting stunned by an enemy while riding a flying Pal over water would send the player flying into the sky
・Fixed an issue where commanding a summoned Pal to attack would also target the Black Marketeer and Medal Merchant
・Fixed a bug where Bounty Tokens with identical passive effects did not stack properly
・Fixed an issue where players would sometimes get launched upward when dismounting Azurmane
・Fixed an issue on dedicated servers where Pals could get stuck on top of feed boxes
・Fixed an issue where raiding NPCs could attack players through walls if they couldn't reach them
・Fixed a bug on dedicated servers where Bounty Token effects were not applied upon login
・Fixed an issue where attacking some NPCs did not add to the player's crime level
・Various many other minor bug fixes
===
Thank you for your continued support of Palworld

patches.title: Update v0.4.15: Random Pal mode rework! Bug fixes!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content:
Palworld version v0.4.15 has been released!
==
▼Major Bug Fixes
・Implemented a workaround for a bug that caused map data to reset.
・Fixed several Xbox and SteamDeck crashes.
▼Mechanics Rework
・Reworked Random Pal mode. The level of wild pals that appear has been fixed for each region. This means that the strength of enemies will gradually increase as you progress, and only the pals that appear will be random.
▼Balance Adjustments
・Adjusted the elemental chest rewards. They are now guaranteed to drop Dog Coins and also have a low chance of dropping work suitability books too.
▼Network
・Added measures to address the player rubberbanding issues in multiplayer.
▼Optimization
・Optimized save data file sizes.
▼Bug Fixes
・Fixed an issue where Pals at bases would get stuck on each other on dedicated servers
・Fixed an issue where some naturally occurring map objects, such as mushrooms, were not spawning after being destroyed by player construction
・Fixed an issue where neutral NPCs spawned in random events would not become criminal when attacked
・Fixed an issue where Pals would not work if summoned too close to a tree
・Fixed an issue where NPCs would sometimes shake when firing their guns
・Fixed minor bugs such as texture issues
・Fixed an issue where anti-aircraft missile launchers would occasionally respawn
・Fixed an issue where some buildings would not align properly
・Fixed an issue where Pals would not enter caves
==
Thank you for your continued support of Palworld
-------------
The following changes in the v0.4.15 patch were not applied correctly and accidentally left out of the patch:
・Adjusted the elemental chest rewards. They are now guaranteed to drop Dog Coins and also have a low chance of dropping work suitability books too.
We're currently working to correct the issue.
We apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your continued support of Palworld.

patches.title: Update v0.4.14: Spring Festival skins! Balance adjustments and bug fixes!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content:
[Patch Notice]
Palworld version v0.4.14 has been released!
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/89ceab3aa28aebd485fc307aaba458795728ab7f.png[/img]
==
▼Spring Festival Skins!
Five Spring Festival skins have been added for all players!
(※You must have the corresponding Pal to equip the skin)
・Lucky Cattiva
・Fortune-Bringer Lyleen
・Fortune-Bringer Lyleen Noct
・Lion-Dancer Chillet
・Lion-Dancer Chillet Ignis
▼Specification Adjustments
・Pals will now target the nearest enemy after being summoned
・Changed the behaviour of large Pals at bases to be the same as small Pals. This allows them to pass through narrow passages and they will be less likely to collide with ceilings and such
・Added earth element to Mammorest and Mammorest Cryst
・Added water element and the work suitability "watering" to Killamari
▼Balance Adjustments
・Reduced the amount of power required by the large electric egg incubator and significantly increased the amount of power stored in the battery
・Expanded the range of the target area near the reticle when targeting the same enemy
・Fixed a bug where the stamina of some Pals was different between normal Pals and Alpha Pals
・Adjusted the rewards from large oil rig treasure chest and removed the uncommon plasma cannon blueprint
・Extended the distance at which the Advanced Bow damage begins to drop off by 1.5
・Reduced the amount of plasteel required when crafting weapons and armor
・Increased the production speed of crude oil from the crude oil extractor
・Increased the rate at which crude oil extraction speed increases at the Pal Labor Research Laboratory
・Increased the durability of weapons and armor that can be created with some blueprints (durability of already created equipment will remain unchanged, so it will appear that the durability has decreased at first)
▼Bug Fixes
・Fixed a bug that caused the game to crash when a Pal with four negative passive skills was put through surgery by Dr. Brawn
・Fixed a bug that caused the NEW display in the building UI to not disappear when starting a new save data
・Fixed an issue that caused the treasure chest in the Oil Rig to not respawn
・Fixed a bug that sometimes caused the workbench effect to remain
・Fixed a bug that caused the PS5 players to be able to join Xbox games. This feature is currently under development and was released unintentionally
・Fixed an issue where some terrain was disappearing
==
Thank you for your continued support of Palworld

patches.title: Celebrating Palworld’s first anniversary! Future roadmap revealed!
patches.author: pocketpair_admin
patches.content:
Hello everyone!
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/8fab0bbe7cef72817388ed5679204b3e19e5e4c8.png[/img]
[h2]･Worldwide Pal Popularity Poll[/h2]
We'll be holding a popularity vote for the over 180 Pals that have appeared so far, as well as the seven leaders of the enemy factions. We invite all players and fans to take part.
Voting Site
https://vote.pocketpair.jp/
[h2]･Future Updates[/h2]
We've been updating the game since the start of Early Access, and we'll continue to update Palworld as we prepare for the official release!
The future roadmap includes the following:
-CO-OP Crossplay
-World Transfers for Pals
-World Tree / Ending Scenario
-Further ways to strengthen and improve Pals
-Various new content such as new Pals and technologies
-Game Collaborations (Including Terraria)
-Improvements to world object placement
-Improvements to base Pals
-Improvements to optimization
-Improvements to UX
We look forward to your continued support for Palworld in its second year.
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40671762/4e483ed163c262e7411cead6612ca65cb5e6ca38.png[/img]
[h2]･Soundtrack Released for Free![/h2]
The soundtrack is available for free on the Pocketpair official YouTube channel. Enjoy the music of Palworld, a mysterious world of adventure and action, and enjoy a unique video featuring over 50 different Pals!
[previewyoutube=k-ywFLxwu-k;full][/previewyoutube]
Thank you for your continued support of Palworld.
Palworld Development Team
